UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIU, SIDNEY AS TO DEFENDANT MULLIGAN, KEVIN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDGE PRO TEM FARLEY TOLPEN; JLEWIS REPORTER; JPASTOR CLERK. C/C FOR S/C. PLTF S CHIU & AGENT MARLEY FONG AND DEFT K. MULLIGAN AND ATTY R DAVIS PRESENT. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULLIGAN, KEVIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2250 - 33RD AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL NOV-15-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT WAIVES ONE HALF OF THE $1,550.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT, THE OTHER PORTION TO BE RETURNED IN ACCORDANCE TO THE LAW. RENTS AND DAMAGES ARE WAIVED THRU 15-NOV-96. ANY PERSONAL PROPERT Y REMAINING ON THE PREMISES SHALL BE DEEMED ABANDONED. SEE STIPULATION & JUDGMENT FOR ANY FURTHER TERMS & CONDITIONS
